meanings.definition: the most recent news or development
up to the immediate present; most recent or most up-to-date
in the current fashion or style
being or occurring at an advanced period of time or after a usual or expected time
after the expected or usual time; delayed
examples: tardy children are sent to the principal
always tardy in making dental appointments

meanings.definition: of the immediate past or just previous to the present time
examples: a recent issue of the journal

meanings.definition: of a later stage in the development of a language or literature; used especially of dead languages
at or toward an end or late period or stage of development
examples: a later symptom of the disease
later medical science could have saved the child

meanings.definition: (used especially of persons) of the immediate past
examples: our late President is still very active
the previous occupant of the White House
